description: A curated collection of foundational treaties, protocols, and regulations of the Economic Community of West African States.

documents.title: ECOWAS Treaty (Revised)
documents.summary: The foundational treaty establishing the Economic Community of West African States. It outlines the community's objectives, institutions, and the legal framework for economic integration, free movement, and regional cooperation.

documents.title: Protocol on the Free Movement of Persons, Goods, and Services
documents.summary: Establishes the right of ECOWAS citizens to enter, reside, and establish businesses in any member state. Guarantees the free movement of goods and services across the region.

documents.title: Protocol on the Community Court of Justice
documents.summary: Establishes the ECOWAS Community Court of Justice, its jurisdiction, composition, and procedures. Grants individuals the right to bring actions against community institutions.
documents.citation_format: ECOWAS Protocol on the Community Court of Justice (2005)

documents.title: Regulation on the Harmonization of Customs Procedures
documents.summary: Harmonizes customs procedures and documentation across ECOWAS member states to facilitate cross-border trade and reduce non-tariff barriers.

documents.title: Regulation on the ECOWAS Common External Tariff (CET)
documents.summary: Establishes a common external tariff for goods imported into the ECOWAS region, promoting regional integration and protecting local industries.
documents.citation_format: ECOWAS Regulation on the Common External Tariff (2015)

documents.title: Regulation on the Harmonization of Investment Policies
documents.summary: Harmonizes investment policies across the region, providing a uniform framework for foreign direct investment and investor protection within ECOWAS.

documents.title: Protocol on the Mechanism for Conflict Prevention, Management, and Resolution
documents.summary: Establishes the framework for conflict prevention, management, and resolution in West Africa, including the ECOMOG peacekeeping force and early warning systems.

documents.title: Regulation on the ECOWAS Passport
documents.summary: Establishes the legal framework for the issuance and mutual recognition of the ECOWAS biometric passport across all member states.
documents.citation_format: ECOWAS Regulation on the ECOWAS Passport (2016)

documents.title: Directive on the Harmonization of Business Registration
documents.summary: Directs member states to harmonize their business registration procedures to reduce the time and cost of starting a business within the community.
documents.citation_format: ECOWAS Directive on Business Registration Harmonization (2020)

documents.title: ECOWAS Court of Justice: Olajide v. Nigeria (2022)
documents.summary: A landmark judgment by the ECOWAS Community Court of Justice affirming the right of citizens to seek redress for human rights violations committed by member states.
